---
title: "R Notebook"
output: html_notebook
---

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(vegan)
library(ggplot2)

data_paa <- readRDS("data_paa.rds")

data_nmds <- data_paa %>%
  select(PAA, epochs, learning_rate, num_img, num_class) %>%
  na.omit()

matrix_nmds <- data_nmds %>%
  select(epochs, learning_rate, num_img, num_class)

matrix_nmds_scaled <- scale(matrix_nmds)

nmds_result <- metaMDS(matrix_nmds_scaled, distance = "euclidean", k = 2, trymax = 100)

nmds_result$stress

nmds_scores <- as.data.frame(scores(nmds_result))

nmds_scores$PAA <- data_nmds$PAA

ggplot(nmds_scores, aes(x = NMDS1, y = NMDS2, color = PAA)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(
    x = "NMDS1",
    y = "NMDS2",
    color = "PAA"
  )


```
